title: mutisia lanata
intro: Mutisia lanata, also known as the woolly Mutisia, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Mutisia lanata include the potential treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Mutisia lanata typically involve the use of its leaves, which can be dried and infused in hot water to make a tea or used in tincture form to extract its medicinal compounds.
